title: The Midnight Sale
scenario: A big online sale is on and a ₹35,000 smartphone you have been eyeing is now ₹28,000. Your current phone works perfectly fine. The countdown timer and 'only 3 left' banner are pushing you to buy right now.

choices.label: Add it to your wishlist and revisit after 48 hours
choices.lesson: A cooling-off period defuses urgency tactics. If you still want it in two days and can afford it, it is a real need rather than an impulse.

choices.label: Buy it now before the deal disappears
choices.lesson: Sales manufacture urgency to short-circuit your judgement. A discount on something you did not need is still money spent, not money saved.
